'''Dolstan''' was one of the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of the [[Pimbrellan League]]. It was the planet originally settled by the [[Pinacism|Pinacists]], and was dominant in League politics. It was a dry planet, covered in savannas, deserts and land-locked salt lakes. The land was fertile, and Dolstan provided much of the food for the League.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-01-15 -->''[[The Kathol Outback]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
